title: NekoUI - Classic Animated Background
body:
# About
An extension for NekoUI


Dependencies : [NekoUI](https://modrinth.com/project/EZpbRipP)

# Preview
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33b4207900f8abd058f17b8801e5bef08855ffdc.png)

# How To Use
1. Go to NekoUI settings in Mod Menu, and select the background
2. Set the frame at 20
3. relog the game


![How to use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b1550e4de725f1ec2b0090e2b039e883819ee9d_0.webp)

### Credit
[Aesthetic UI Pack MCPE](https://www.9minecraft.net/aesthetic-ui-pack-mcpe/)
